name: 36" x 36" Shape Abstract Framed Wall Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Update your space with the 36" x 36" Shape Abstract Framed Wall Canvas from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. A simple yet stunning work of art, display it in any part of your home to jazz up the room. You can also hang this framed abstract artwork as a standalone piece or as part of your gallery wall.
